titleStmt.title: SII 9.224: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 224. (A.R. No. 230 of 1913.) ON A STONE SET UP IN THE RAMALINGESVARA TEMPLE AT SINDAVALA, BELLARY TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated the 5th year of the reign of the Chāḷukya king Bhūlōkamalladēva (ruling from Kalyāṇa), Sādhāraṇa, Kārtika, śu. 1. Sōmavāra, Sūrya-grahaṇa. The details corresponded to A.D. 1130 October 4 Saturday; a solar eclipse took place on the day. The brave Brāhman general Anantapālayya is stated to have made a gift of land for the service of the god Sōmēśvaradēva set up by Kēsiyaṇa, Kēta-Gāvuṇḍa, Mācha-Gāvuṇḍa, and Chokiseṭṭi of Sindavoḷal in Sindavāḍi thousand and for the feeding and clothing of the ascetic Kaṟikaṇṭhajīya and the worshipper Chandrabhūshaṇa. To enforce the gift the minister Anantapālayya issued orders to Perggaḍe Chākaṇayya. A garden, an oil-mill and a house-site were also granted.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicandracāmaracā
ravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbha(ṁ)
mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti samasta
bhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ
mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ para
mabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḻatiḻakaṁ cāḻu
kyābharaṇaṁ śrīmadbhūlōkamalladēvara vijaya
rājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamā
caṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttaṁ kalyāṇapurada nelevīḍi
noḻu sukhasaṁkatāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttami
re tatpādapadmōpajīvi svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahā
śabda mahāsāmaṁtādhipati mahāpracaṁḍadaṁḍanā
yakaṁ vibudhavaradāyakaṁ sujanaprasaṁnaṁ nuḍidu
matteṁnaṁ gōtrapavitraṁ parāṁganāputraṁ ture
yarēvantaṁ vairikritāṁtaṁ sāhasōttuṁganayyanasiṁga
nāmādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanumahā
pradhānaṁ bhāṇasuverggaḍe maneverggaḍe sēnādhipati daṁḍanāyakanana
ntapāḻayyaṁgaḻu © śrīmaccāḷukyabhūlōkavarṣada 5 ne
ya sādhāraṇasaṁvatsarada kārtika śuddha 1 sōmavāradaṁ
du sūryyagrahaṇaparvvanimittavāgi tuṁgabhadrānadītī
radalli siṁdavāḍi sāyiradoḻagaṇa taṁmāḻkeya siṁdapoḻala
hoḻalimeyana kēsiyaṇanu Ajjimayana kētagāvuṁḍanuṁ mā
cagāvuṁḍanuṁ cokiseṭṭiyuṁ kūḍi māḍisida śrīsōmē
svaradēvargge pūjepunaskāranaṁdādīvigenivēdyakkaṁ khaṇḍa
sphuṭitajīrnnōddhārakkaṁ Alliya tapōdhanaṁ kaṟikaṁ
ṭhajīyanuṁ pūjāri caṁdrabhūṣaṇaṁgaṁ Aśa
nācchādanakkaṁ dhārāpūrvvakamāgi koṭṭu samastarājya
bharanirūpitamahāmātyapadavīvirājamānamānō
nnataprabhumaṁtrōtsāhaśaktitrayaguṇasaṁpannarappa
śrīmanumahāpradhānanalliyadhikāri herggaḍe cā
kaṇayyaṁge samarppayisi besasalūriṁ mūḍavolada
lu medeyahaḻchiya dāriyiṁ baḍaga haradaṁgeṟeya Ē
riyiṁ teṁkalubhayarāyabeṁkoḻva nālvattanālgēṇa ghaḻeya
lūriṁ mūḍavoladalu biṭṭa kariya bhūmi mattaru ha
nneraḍu Aṁkadoḻaṁ mattaru 12 Ī kayyoḻage bhairavadēvargge matta
ru 2 pūjārigeyi mattaru 3 Aṁtaydu mattaru keyyuva pū
jāri caṁdrabhūṣaṇaṁge mēlāda keyi mattarēḻuṁ kaṟikaṁ
ṭhaṁge Ūriṁdeṁka baḍḍagiguyyalu 1 hagareya taḍiya tōṁ
ṭa 1 gāṇa 1 maneyanivēśaṇa 1 Īṁtī dharmmavanāva
norvva pratipālisidargge gaṁgevāraṇāsikurukṣētradalu
sāsirvvaru brāhmaṇargge sāvira kavilegaḻaṁ dānaṁgayda phalaṁ
Ī dharmmavanāvanōrvvaneḻidargge gaṁgevāraṇāsikurukṣē
tradalu sāvira kavilegaḻmaṁ sāsirvvaru brāhmaṇarumana
ḻida pātakamakku . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētuṁ nripā
ṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvānētānu pārtthivō
bhāvitēṁdrā bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdra

srāṇāṁ miṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi © © śrīśrīśrī .
